title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Rebecca, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #3 as law moves toward the Caesar exchange at Green Bit while Luffy is drawn deeper into the Colosseum’s violent tournament.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There are impressive heavy hitters in every block

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: falling out of the ring will result in Disquali- Fiction!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: As will dying in the ring !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Only one will be left standing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well.... who should I start with ??

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
